Power_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "BD3B17E841960A36718E6A9D83C6CB45", "Congratulations on constructing your first proper <Important>Habitat</>! You are well on the way to creating a thriving <Important>Outpost</>.

You've now unlocked a large amount of new <Important>Facilities</> for construction.

In order to function, most <Important>Facilities</> that are built within <Important>Habitats</> require <Important>Power</>, provided via <Important>Power Slots</>.
<Important>Facilities</> display the amount of <Important>Power Slots</> they require in <Important>Build Mode</>, and once constructed, display how many they are occupying in their <Important>Info Panel</>.

<Important>Habitats</> display the amount of <Important>Power Slots</> they provide in the same ways.
Blue slots are occupied, and grey slots are empty.

Placing a <Important>Facility</> within a <Important>Habitat</> automatically connects it to <Important>Power</>, and occupies free <Important>Power Slots</>.
<Important>Deconstructing</> a <Important>Facility</> will free up any <Important>Power Slots</> it was occupying.

You'll need to continue expanding the <Important>Outpost</> over time with new <Important>Habitats</> in order to support the <Important>Facilities</> you'll want to construct.")
